root_text.an4.220:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.220:1.3: Assaddho hoti, dussīlo hoti, kusīto hoti, duppañño hoti—
root_text.an4.220:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.220:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.220:2.3: Saddho hoti, sīlavā hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, paññavā hoti—
root_text.an4.220:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.220:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.220:1.3: They’re faithless, unethical, lazy, and witless.
translation_text.an4.220:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.220:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.220:2.3: They’re faithful, ethical, energetic, and wise.
translation_text.an4.220:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
